name: SignatureGate - PGSQL - List Available Sacrament Products

parameters.query:
={{ `
SELECT
  COALESCE(p.airtable_id, p.nocopk::text) AS airtable_record_id,
  p.product_id AS mushroomprocess_product_id,
  p.name_mat AS item_name,
  s.species_strain AS strain,
  p.net_weight_g,
  'g'::text AS unit,
  loc.name AS storage_location,
  CASE WHEN loc.name IS NULL THEN ARRAY[]::text[] ELSE ARRAY[loc.name] END AS storage_locations
FROM public.products p
LEFT JOIN public.locations loc ON loc.nocopk = p.storage_location_id
LEFT JOIN public.strains s ON s.nocopk = p.strain_id
WHERE p.product_id IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(p.item_category_mat, '') = 'freezedriedmushrooms'
  AND COALESCE(s.regulated, false) = true
  AND COALESCE(loc.name, '') NOT IN ('Shipped', 'Consumed', 'Expired')
ORDER BY p.product_id;` }}
